items.raw_desc: Matcha Nyoko Japan Matcha Kagoshima Naomi BIO 100 g - zöld tea:Green Tea Nyoko Japan Matcha Ami Ceremonial100g                Japan Matcha Nyoko Kagoshima Naomi BIO is a premium matcha green tea that offers a complex and perfectly balanced flavor, jade green infusion and emerald green colour. The tea is ideal for long-time lovers of quality matcha who are looking for an authentic and harmonious experience, as well as for newcomers. Nyoko Japan Kagoshima Naomi's organic quality matcha contains vitamins, minerals, trace elements and more caffeine and theanine than regular green teas.     The preparation of matcha tea requires special equipment to preserve its quality. Tea should not come into contact with metal, so bamboo tools (chashaku, chasen, chavan) are used. The water should be heated to about 60 °C and 2 teaspoons of matcha per 200 ml of water should be used. If you are not used to its taste, start with a thinner infusion. Traditional Japanese powdered tea is suitable not only for tea ceremony, but also for everyday drinking.     Key features of Nyoko Japan...

Vilgain offers you this unique source of bioactive substances in the form of freeze-dried powder from the Netherlands.
